notes: Hotfixes the visible version badge so it cannot regress to an older installed version if the browser, server, or CDN returns stale version.json during startup.
Adds a bundled version floor in fixed-site/js/boot.js and shows the bundled version immediately before the version.json fetch completes.
Adds a version query to the boot.js script tag in index.html to force the updated boot loader to be fetched.
No species records, route/category logic, data JSON, image fields, UI layout, color scheme, edible statuses, medicinal fields, or map features changed.
